sections.installation: Install, activate and go to 'Design' and 'Modules'.
sections.changelog:
4.0.9 | update modules list
4.0.8 | improve updating of modules
4.0.7 | enable submodules underscoring
4.0.6 | selective module updates and clearer modules list
4.0.5 | enable sub-modules in plugin and theme, unlist core-site-stylebase
4.0.4 | list new module core-site-stylebase
4.0.3 | add plugin icon and tweak actions
4.0.2 | enable ?force-delete modules in admin, display versions and new github tags
4.0.1 | improve admin integration and enable load from your-theme/modules/
4.0.0 | initial release
